ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule), OR( RecordType.Name = 'Container GENSET Quote',RecordType.Name = 'Container NT Quote'), CONTAINER_Check_if_Pending_Job_status__c = 'True', OR(ISPICKVAL( CONTAINER_Status__c , 'Lost'), ISPICKVAL( CONTAINER_Status__c , 'Cancelled')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: After the quote status has been changed to “Order/Pending for Job #”, Quote can't be marked as lost or cancelled
